title: FlowState Tracker
summary: Built FlowState Tracker, a BJJ training and performance app/webapp that helps athletes log sessions, understand their training, and improve over time.
problem: BJJ athletes needed a clearer way to record training consistently, spot patterns across sessions, and turn day-to-day mat time into useful performance insight.
approach: Designed and built a responsive product experience focused on easy session logging, readable training data, and a streamlined interface that works well across mobile and desktop.
outcome: FlowState Tracker is now live at www.flowstatebjj.online as a dedicated BJJ training and performance platform with portfolio-ready product imagery and a clear value proposition for athletes.
metrics: BJJ-focused app/webapp designed to help athletes track sessions and monitor progress over time.

title: Long Eaton BJJ Website
summary: Built and launched the live public website for Long Eaton BJJ with clear navigation for timetable, pricing, instructors, kids classes, gallery, and contact.
problem: The gym needed a clearer digital presence so new students and parents could quickly understand the offer and book a free trial.
approach: Built a mobile-first site structure with direct CTAs, concise page sections, and route-level navigation for each core info area.
outcome: The club now has a live production site at www.longeatonbjj.co.uk with clear trial and contact pathways, social links, and a dedicated gallery experience.
metrics: Sticky mobile action bar includes direct Book Trial and Call buttons.
Contact surfaces include click-to-call plus WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook links.

testimonial.quote: The new website has been fantastic for us. It's easy to navigate, looks great on mobile, and has definitely helped us attract new customers.
testimonial.author: Long Eaton BJJ
